steps.title: Evaluate g(15a) and g(7a) using the sign constraint
steps.content:
Since $a < 0$, both $15a$ and $7a$ are negative. For negative numbers, $|x| = -x$, so:
$$g(15a) = \frac{|15a|}{a} - 14 = \frac{-15a}{a} - 14 = -15 - 14 = -29$$
$$g(7a) = \frac{|7a|}{a} - 14 = \frac{-7a}{a} - 14 = -7 - 14 = -21$$

steps.title: Compute the product of the two values
